_meta.note: This is a FlowGraph chart file. Open it with the FlowGraph app to view and edit the interactive dependency flowchart.
_meta.author: Giang Tran
_meta.usage: In the app: click the folder icon (or drag-and-drop this file) to load it. Use Design Mode to edit nodes, groups, and phases.

nodes.name: Offer Accepted
nodes.description: Candidate verbally accepts the offer. Formal offer letter countersigned and filed. Triggers all parallel onboarding workstreams.

nodes.name: Background Check
nodes.description: Third-party screening for employment history, criminal record, and reference verification. Must clear before benefits enrollment can begin.

nodes.name: IT Setup Request
nodes.description: HR submits new-hire IT ticket. IT provisions accounts in Active Directory, assigns software licences, and queues hardware order.

nodes.name: Office Assignment
nodes.description: Desk, locker, and building access card assigned. Parking permit issued if applicable. Space ready before Day 1.

nodes.name: Benefits Enrollment
nodes.description: Employee selects health, dental, and retirement plan options through the HR portal. Requires cleared background check.

nodes.name: Equipment Ready
nodes.description: Laptop imaged with standard software load, peripherals sourced, and device enrolled in MDM. Staged for collection or delivery.

nodes.name: Access Provisioned
nodes.description: SSO accounts, VPN credentials, and role-based application access activated. Physical badge cloned to door-access groups.

nodes.name: Day-1 Readiness
nodes.description: Final checklist: benefits confirmed, equipment staged, credentials active. Green-light given to manager to confirm start date.

nodes.name: First Day
nodes.description: Employee arrives, completes welcome session, meets team, and receives 30-60-90 day plan. Onboarding formally complete.
